data.technical_cause: Hydraulic pressure oscillation caused by thermal expansion of the blade assembly exceeding 0.05mm tolerance.
data.suggested_solution: Recalibrate the hydraulic valve manifold and verify cooling system flow rate (min 15 GPM). Inspect blade guides for excessive heat scoring.

data.technical_cause: Critical wear threshold reached (65%+); leading edge geometry deformation causes secondary friction drag.
data.suggested_solution: Perform immediate blade replacement. Inspect hydraulic filters for metallic particulate residue from over-stressed pins.

data.technical_cause: Blade imbalance due to non-uniform material wear or debris accumulation in the hub flange.
data.suggested_solution: Clean hub assembly and perform static balance check. Torque blade mounting bolts to 450 ft-lbs.

data.technical_cause: Blunt blade edges forcing pump to bypass relief valve frequently to maintain cutting torque.
data.suggested_solution: Verify blade sharpness. If wear is within limits, check heat exchanger fan relay and clean cooling fins.
